visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a beige bucket hat and a cream-colored puff-sleeved top, stands in a brightly lit Costco freezer aisle. She gestures with her right hand towards the glass-door freezers filled with red and yellow food boxes behind her, looking directly at the camera with an excited expression while a large red Costco logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera follows her as she steps closer and pulls open the heavy glass freezer door with a determined grip. She reaches inside and retrieves a large, substantial red cardboard box labeled as pork dumplings, appearing to struggle slightly with the weight to emphasize the large quantity of food contained within while smiling brightly at the viewer. (3) The scene cuts to a top-down view inside the opened cardboard box, revealing two large, clear plastic bags tightly packed with numerous small, pale, crescent-shaped frozen dumplings. A hand enters the frame to ruffle and point at the bags, highlighting the texture of the frozen dough and the sheer volume of the product against a white background. (4) In a kitchen setting, a metal mesh strainer is used to lift several white, freshly cooked dumplings from a pot of vigorously boiling water on a stove. Steam rises into the air, obscuring part of the background, which includes stainless steel cookware and a modern kitchen countertop under bright indoor lighting. (5) The final phase takes place in a cozy indoor living room where the original woman is joined by another woman in a white dress. They sit at a low table with small plates of dumplings and dipping sauce, using chopsticks to eat while smiling and talking animatedly to the camera about the taste experience.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 史上最便宜! 好吃嗎??. [Subtitle]: 一顆不用2元 豬肉水餃. (2) [Variety]: 太便宜了吧!!. [Subtitle]: 這個水餃連兩塊都不用耶. (3) [Subtitle]: 最新出的豬肉水餃 一顆只要1.83元. (4) [Variety]: 什麼 什麼. (5) [Subtitle]: 來吃吃看. (6) [Subtitle]: 一顆不用兩塊錢的水餃 拿不起來. (7) [Subtitle]: 很重 裡面超多顆的. (8) [Subtitle]: 來看看值不值得. (9) [Variety]: 有180顆. [Subtitle]: 這樣裡面有180顆 只要329元. (10) [Subtitle]: 不用兩塊錢就有一顆耶. (11) [Subtitle]: 好可愛喔 寶寶水餃. (12) [Subtitle]: 這個就像水餃寶寶一樣 超級無敵可愛. (13) [Subtitle]: 超可愛 喔 而且它的皺褶很多. (14) [Subtitle]: 它它皺褶掐的很漂亮. (15) [Subtitle]: 好漂亮 喜歡 小荷葉邊. (16) [Variety]: 煮水餃中. (17) [Variety]: 最便宜的水餃來了. [Subtitle]: 好市多最便宜的水餃來了. (18) [Subtitle]: 一顆不用兩塊錢 最重要是我們剛煮20顆. (19) [Subtitle]: 咻~只剩下5顆了 它會讓你一口接一口. (20) [Subtitle]: 完全停不下來 它的餃子偏小. (21) [Slogan]: 內餡非常認真. [Subtitle]: 重點是它的內餡非常認真. (22) [Subtitle]: 它內餡是吃得到高麗菜跟豬肉. (23) [Subtitle]: 就是它的高麗菜是非常有口感. (24) [Subtitle]: 脆脆的那種感覺 然後整個肉也有香味. (25) [Subtitle]: 又有那種肉汁出來 然後皮呢是比較厚. (26) [Subtitle]: 它的皮偏多 比跟外面比起來. (27) [Subtitle]: 它的餃子比較沒有那麼皮薄肉多. (28) [Subtitle]: 但是調味很認真 CP值超高!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator in a hat, 1 female companion appearing in the tasting scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a tan bucket hat and a cream-colored off-the-shoulder puff-sleeved top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco freezer section with rows of frozen food products, a domestic kitchen with a stovetop and boiling pot, and a neutral-toned living room with a coffee table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The track begins with high-energy, upbeat electronic pop music featuring a prominent 4/4 synthesized drum beat. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and rapid speech rate, delivering a promotional hook about Costco deals. The acoustic environment has a slight room resonance typical of large stores. (2) A sharp mechanical "click" and the suction sound of a rubber seal breaking occur as the freezer door is opened. The BGM continues at a steady volume while the narrator's vocal intensity increases, emphasizing the low unit price with rhythmic pauses for emphasis. (3) The auditory focus shifts to the sharp, high-frequency "crinkling" and "rustling" sounds of heavy plastic bags being moved inside a cardboard box. The narrator’s voice remains dominant in the mix, maintaining an animated tone as she describes the quantity of the product. (4) A melodic "bing" sound effect marks a scene transition. The distinct sound of bubbling water and splashing becomes audible as dumplings are moved. The narrator's speech rate remains high, providing instructions and first impressions of the product's appearance during cooking. (5) The final phase features two female voices interacting with moderate conversational intensity. Clear sounds of chopsticks clinking and subtle chewing are heard between energetic verbal reactions. The upbeat BGM persists until a final bright synthesized chime concludes the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To highlight a exceptionally high-value (cheap) frozen pork dumpling product found at Costco, demonstrating its quantity, preparation, and taste to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While identifying a specific brand (Chen Pin), the tone is that of a personal shopping recommendation and value review common in social media 'Costco finds' content.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media edit using rapid cuts, on-screen text, and upbeat music to maintain viewer engagement during a product review.
